channel.title: Jan Averkin
channel.description: Doctoral researcher in economics at ETH Zürich.

item.title: Hello, world
item.dc:creator: Jan Averkin
item.description:
This is the first post on my new site. I plan to use this space for short notes on my research, things I’m reading, and the occasional project or side interest.

Because the site is built with Quarto, posts can mix prose with live code. By default this post renders as plain Markdown, so the R below is shown but not executed. To make a post actually run R and embed the output, set engine: knitr in its front matter and render locally (you have R installed):

library(ggplot2)
ggplot(mpg, aes(displ, hwy, colour = class)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal()

To add another post, copy the posts/welcome/ folder, rename it, and edit the front matter (title, date, categories). The Blog page picks it up automatically.
